Global (All).title: US-China Trade Tensions Escalate
Global (All).summary: The US and China have increased their rhetoric in a long-standing trade dispute, with both countries imposing tariffs on each other's goods.

Global (All).title: Global Economic Slowdown Concerns
Global (All).summary: A slowdown in global economic growth has been flagged by the International Monetary Fund, with concerns over the impact of rising debt and trade tensions.

Global (All).title: EU's Brexit Deal Uncertainty
Global (All).summary: The European Union and the United Kingdom are engaged in talks to resolve the status of Northern Ireland, a crucial aspect of the Brexit agreement.

United States.title: Heat wave causes widespread death and destruction in the Pacific Northwest, USA
United States.summary: A severe heat wave has caused at least 70 deaths in Oregon and Washington, straining hospitals and infrastructure.

United States.title: Shooting in Chicago marks deadliest weekend in city's recent history
United States.summary: At least 10 people were killed and 40 injured in gun violence in Chicago over the weekend.

United States.title: Florida governor signs law banning abortion after 6 weeks pregnancy
United States.summary: New law restricts access to abortion, sparking concerns about reproductive rights and women's health.

South Korea.title: North Korea says it's developed a new type of intercontinental ballistic missile
South Korea.summary: North Korea's state-run media announced that the country has successfully developed a new type of intercontinental ballistic missile (ICBM) that it claims can evade missile defense systems. The development comes as tensions between North Korea and the US and its allies remain high.

South Korea.title: Protests against President Yoon's economic policies continue in South Korea
South Korea.summary: Thousands of protesters took to the streets in major cities across South Korea to express their discontent with President Yoon Suk-yeol's economic policies, which they claim have failed to address the country's growing income inequality and poverty.

Japan.title: Magnitude 6.8 earthquake strikes northern Japan: Japan Weather Agency reports
Japan.summary: The earthquake occurred off the coast of northern Japan and prompted authorities to issue a tsunami warning, though it was later lifted.

Japan.title: Japan records 14,000 COVID-19 cases, with infections in Tokyo hitting 10-year high: Government report
Japan.summary: The sharp rise in cases has raised concerns about the possibility of a sixth wave of the virus in the country.

Japan.title: Japan's Kishida to visit US amid tension over Taiwan
Japan.summary: The visit is set to take place in a few days and comes amid escalating tensions between the US and China over Taiwan.
